# Effect size methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Refresher on effect size calculation

- Calculation of Cohen's *d*, *r*, etc.

## Distributions of effect sizes

- Distributions of *d*, *r*, partial eta-squared, etc.
  - For different types of phenomena/tests (e.g., interventions vs manipulation checks)
  - For different fields
  - Avoiding ever saying "domain knowledge"

## Maximum positive controls and intuition benchmarks

- Using known effects as anchors for plausibility assessment

## Common errors

- The Standard Error error (reporting SE instead of SD, or vice versa)
